label: hate
rationale: 'Luos are FOOLS' - collective attribution of stupidity to an ethnic group.

label: hate
rationale: 'Address them as Luo goons' - collectively characterizes Luos as violent thugs across multiple incidents.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Huskii hawezi kunja ngumi' - personal mockery without ethnic basis.

label: hate
rationale: 'your community they are now goons' + 'When did we go so low as luos' - collective characterization.

label: hate
rationale: 'KIKUYUS WILL DO NOTHING. BY FIRE OR BULLETS' - threat of violence targeting ethnic group.

label: offensive
rationale: 'BOOMER BULLSHIT' and 'FOOLISH MEN' - generic insults, Luos referenced as victims not targets.

label: hate
rationale: 'nyinyi ni mafala Sana' - collective attribution of foolishness to regional/ethnic group.

label: offensive
rationale: 'This animal is soo crude MURKOMEN' - dehumanizing insult aimed at individual politician.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyus are currently the biggest consumers of fake news' - collective attribution of gullibility.

label: neither
rationale: 'Nani alituroga sisi wakale' - self-referential community frustration, not attack.

label: hate
rationale: 'The yamunes greed is on another level' - collective attribution of greed via coded term.

label: hate
rationale: 'Luos are FOOLS' - collective attribution of stupidity to ethnic group.

label: neither
rationale: 'These are Luhyas who are sellouts' - criticism of specific politicians, not the community.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kambas can't lead' - declares entire ethnic community categorically unfit to lead.

label: hate
rationale: 'African men are docile and losers' - collective negative attribution based on race and gender.

label: neither
rationale: 'waluhya ndio watafanya kasongo apite' - electoral prediction without contempt.

label: neither
rationale: Political criticism of tribal politics behavior, warning against tribalism rather than expressing ethnic contempt.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Wamunyoro is the chief goon' - personal insult targeting individual.

label: hate
rationale: 'yamune nincompoops' with 'insatiable urge to steal everything' - collective attribution via coded term.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Orangutan' and 'Makende ya nyani' - vulgar dehumanizing insults aimed at individual Theuri.

label: hate
rationale: 'wajaluo wamepangiwa kazi ya goons' - collectively characterizes Luos as assigned to be goons.

label: hate
rationale: 'Luos failed to turn up... You guys are frauds and hipocrites' - collective negative attribution.

label: hate
rationale: 'Entitled Kikuyus' with collective attribution of duplicitous political maneuvering.

label: hate
rationale: 'Entitled kikuyus' plus 'wajinga waliisha Kenya' - collective attribution of entitlement and foolishness.

label: hate
rationale: 'gema is just kikuyu enslaving other tribes' - collective accusation of oppression.
